STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_BROT: Whenever another player plays a Sovereign Blade, add a Sovereign Blade to your hand.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SERP: Whenever any player plays a Shiv, all players gain Block.
Whenever any player plays a Shiv, all players gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Block.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_TIGE: When you play a card of a different type than your last Attack/Skill/Power, draw cards.
When you play a different Attack/Skill/Power type than the previous, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] card(s).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_DRAW: The next time you draw your hand, draw fewer cards, then remove this.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_CHEC: If you play no Attack before your turn phase ends, suffer a penalty; the applier gains next-turn resources.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_CORP: At the end of a player's turn, they lose HP, then this is removed.
At the end of a player's turn, they lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] HP, then this is removed.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_GAMB: When a non-player dies, split gold among living players (capped).
When a non-player dies, split up to min(Max HP, [blue]{Amount}[/blue]) gold among living players.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_DOUB: Enemy attacks deal double damage to you for several player turns.
Enemy attacks deal double damage for [blue]{Amount}[/blue] player turn(s).
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_SHAR: Gain Gold at the end of combat.
Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Gold at the end of combat.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_HANG: Next turn start at 0 Energy and cannot draw cards this turn.
STS2_AI_A_CARD_MULTIPLAYER_POWER_MP_BIAS: When others play cards, channel random Orbs for you based on Energy spent (per play cap).
When others play cards, channel up to [blue]{Amount}[/blue] random Orb(s) per play based on Energy spent.
